verses.text: God fills Bezaleel with His Spirit, in wisdom, to work all manner of craftsmanship. Gifted. God equips men for His own service.
God fills Bezaleel with His Spirit, in wisdom, to work all manner of craftsmanship. Gifted. God equips men for His own service.

God fills Bezaleel with His Spirit, in wisdom, to work all manner of craftsmanship. Gifted. God equips men for His own service.
He appoints Aholiab and wise-hearted men to make the tabernacle and its vessels. Helpers. The work is shared among the skilled.

They are to make the holy garments and the anointing oil, all as commanded. As commanded. Every detail follows God's word.
They are to make the holy garments and the anointing oil, all as commanded. As commanded. Every detail follows God's word.
The sabbath is a sign between God and Israel; whoever profanes it shall die. The sign. Rest marks them as God's people.

The sabbath is a sign between God and Israel; whoever profanes it shall die. The sign. Rest marks them as God's people.

It is a perpetual covenant, for God rested the seventh day. Perpetual. The sabbath testifies to creation's Maker.
It is a perpetual covenant, for God rested the seventh day. Perpetual. The sabbath testifies to creation's Maker.
God gives Moses two tables of stone, 'written with the finger of God.' The tables. God Himself inscribes His law.
